name: Neon CRM Nonprofit API
what_it_does: Neon CRM REST API for nonprofit constituent relationship management. Enables AI agents to manage constituent profiles and donation history, process memberships and renewals, manage event registrations, track volunteer activity, generate fundraising reports, segment donors for campaigns, and integrate nonprofit data with email marketing and payment processing systems.
use_cases: Managing constituent records and donation history from donor relations agents
Processing membership renewals and lapsed member outreach from membership agents
Managing event registration and attendee data from event coordination agents
Segmenting donors for targeted campaigns from fundraising campaign agents
not_for: For-profit CRM without nonprofit fundraising and membership workflows
Grant management systems without constituent relationship components
Large enterprise nonprofits requiring full enterprise-grade CRM capabilities
best_when: A nonprofit organization using Neon CRM wants AI agents to automate donor outreach, manage membership renewals, coordinate events, and maintain accurate constituent engagement data.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Constituent personal data including giving history and volunteer information requires careful handling and compliance with nonprofit data governance standards.

auth.notes: Neon CRM supports API key authentication and OAuth 2.0. API keys are organization-scoped. OAuth required for user-level integrations. Separate credentials per Neon One product. Developer portal available for partner integrations.

pricing.paid_tiers: Essentials, Impact, and Empower tiers based on contact count; API on Impact and above
pricing.notes: Chicago-based Neon One platform. Neon CRM is one product in the Neon One nonprofit technology suite (also includes Neon Fundraise, Neon Pay). Strong membership management capabilities.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Constituent personal data and giving history requires careful handling
No public MCP server — REST API with API key or OAuth2
API access restricted to Impact and higher plans — verify plan tier
Neon One suite has multiple products with separate APIs — clarify which product to integrate
US data residency only — verify for international nonprofit chapters
Membership lifecycle complexity (lapsed, active, grace period) requires careful state management
agent_readiness.security_notes: Nonprofit constituent personal and financial data. SOC2, PCI-DSS. API key and OAuth2. US data residency only.

security_score_components.security_notes: Constituent personal and financial data. SOC2, PCI-DSS. API key and OAuth2. US-only data residency.
